productName: Kelso Kandy - KK TERP+INF PR .8g (Single) - Blue Hawaiian - .8g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Blue Hawaiian flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of tropical, sweet, and blueberry, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
